cards.front: How to see IOS version, uptime, model, IP filename, config register?
cards.back:
```
show version
```
Also shows: license info, last reload reason, system serial, total memory.

cards.front: How to see current running configuration?
cards.back:
```
show running-config                       ! current in RAM
show running-config | section interface   ! filter to a section
show running-config | include hostname    ! filter lines
show running-config | begin router ospf   ! start from match
```

cards.front: How to see saved (boot) configuration?
cards.back:
```
show startup-config
```
On 9000-series: `show startup-config | format` for readable view.

cards.front: Difference: `show ip interface brief` vs `show interfaces status`?
cards.back:
- `show ip interface brief` — IP-centric: name, IP, status, protocol. (Routers + L3 switches)
- `show interfaces status` — port-centric: name, status, duplex, speed, type. (Switches mainly)

cards.front: How to see all interface IPs and up/down state in one shot?
cards.back:
```
show ip interface brief
```
Columns: Interface | IP-Address | OK? | Method | Status | Protocol

cards.front: How to see one interface's full state (errors, counters, MTU, duplex)?
cards.back:
```
show interfaces g0/1
```
Look for: input/output errors, CRC, collisions, runts, giants, duplex, speed, last input/output, last clear.

cards.front: How to see interface error counters only (no full output)?
cards.back:
```
show interfaces g0/1 | include error
show interfaces counters errors
```

cards.front: How to clear interface counters (start fresh):
cards.back:
```
clear counters g0/1
clear counters                            ! all interfaces
```

cards.front: How to see all VLANs and which ports are in each?
cards.back:
```
show vlan brief
```
Trunk ports do NOT appear in this output. Access ports do.

cards.front: How to see VLAN details for one VLAN?
cards.back:
```
show vlan id 10
show vlan name Engineering
```

cards.front: How to verify a port is access or trunk and what VLAN(s) it carries?
cards.back:
```
show interfaces switchport               ! all
show interfaces g0/1 switchport          ! single port
```
Look at: Operational Mode, Access Mode VLAN, Trunking Native Mode VLAN, Trunking VLANs Enabled.

cards.front: How to see all trunks at once with native VLAN + allowed list?
cards.back:
```
show interfaces trunk
```
Columns: Port | Mode | Encapsulation | Status | Native vlan. Then sections for allowed/active/forwarding VLANs.

cards.front: How to see STP state per VLAN — root + port roles?
cards.back:
```
show spanning-tree                       ! all VLANs
show spanning-tree vlan 10               ! one VLAN
```
Top section = Root ID, Bridge ID, this bridge or root. Bottom = per-port: Role (Root/Desg/Altn), Sts (FWD/BLK), Cost, Prio.

cards.front: How to see STP info for one interface?
cards.back:
```
show spanning-tree interface g0/1
show spanning-tree interface g0/1 detail
```

cards.front: How to find STP root bridge for a VLAN?
cards.back:
```
show spanning-tree root
```
One-line-per-VLAN: Root ID + Cost + Port + Hello/MaxAge/Fwd-Delay.

cards.front: How to verify EtherChannel members + status?
cards.back:
```
show etherchannel summary
```
Po flags: `P` bundled, `I` stand-alone, `s` suspended, `D` down. Port flags: `P` in port-channel.

cards.front: How to see EtherChannel load-balance method?
cards.back:
```
show etherchannel load-balance
```

cards.front: How to verify LACP negotiation details?
cards.back:
```
show lacp neighbor
show lacp counters
show lacp internal
```

cards.front: How to see CDP neighbor list (brief)?
cards.back:
```
show cdp neighbors
```
Columns: Device ID | Local Intrfce | Holdtme | Capability | Platform | Port ID.

cards.front: How to see CDP neighbor IPs + IOS version?
cards.back:
```
show cdp neighbors detail
show cdp entry *                          ! same content, different formatting
```

cards.front: LLDP equivalents of `show cdp neighbors`?
cards.back:
```
show lldp neighbors                       ! brief
show lldp neighbors detail                ! incl. management IP, system description
show lldp interface g0/1
```

cards.front: How to see MAC address table (CAM table)?
cards.back:
```
show mac address-table
show mac address-table dynamic
show mac address-table vlan 10
show mac address-table address aaaa.bbbb.cccc       ! lookup specific MAC
show mac address-table interface g0/1               ! MACs learned on a port
```

cards.front: How to see ARP table on a router?
cards.back:
```
show ip arp
show ip arp 10.0.0.1
show ip arp g0/0
```
Shows: IP → MAC → Age → Type (ARPA) → Interface.

cards.front: How to verify port-security config + violations?
cards.back:
```
show port-security                        ! summary table
show port-security interface g0/1         ! one port — max, sticky, violation count, action
show port-security address                ! all sticky/static secure MACs
```

cards.front: How to see speed/duplex auto-negotiated on a port?
cards.back:
```
show interfaces g0/1                      ! near the top — "Full-duplex, 1000Mb/s"
show interfaces status                    ! one-line per port
```

cards.front: How to find which interface a known MAC is on (switching)?
cards.back:
```
show mac address-table address <MAC>
```
Walk recursively across uplinks if MAC is on a far switch — CDP/LLDP helps trace.

cards.front: How to verify Power over Ethernet (PoE) status per port?
cards.back:
```
show power inline                         ! summary all ports
show power inline g0/1                    ! one port — class, power requested/draw, status
```
